google-ads-research._notes: No login required. Wraps Google Suggest + Google Trends + optional Search Console clustering. Zero setup friction, use this first for keyword ideation.

google-keyword-planner._notes: Real search volume, competition, CPC. Requires a Google Ads manager account (MCC), developer token, and a payment method on file (no spend required per docs, but verify on your own account — some accounts get bucketed volume ranges instead of exact numbers without spend history). Set up only if google-ads-research isn't giving you precise enough numbers.

google-trends._notes: Free, no API key. Unofficial Google Trends rate limits apply (wait 60s on 429). Good fit for low/medium volume usage across multiple projects.
